definition: Forward-link line connecting viññāṇa and nāmarūpa.
notes: Use this record for the full line when translating the chain. It keeps the phrase aligned with the repository's conditioned handling of viññāṇa and compact doctrinal handling of nāmarūpa. The OSF glossary supports this coordinated inheritance from viññāṇa and nāmarūpa in the formula line.

context_rules.context: When a controlled alternate for viññāṇa is already in use
context_rules.notes: Use only in a surrounding frame that already governs viññāṇa that way.

authority_basis.scope: Supports coordinated inheritance from viññāṇa and nāmarūpa in the formula line.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard line linking viññāṇa and nāmarūpa in the forward chain.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not let explanatory paraphrases replace the compact doctrinal pair unless the passage explicitly shifts register.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the line from collapsing nāmarūpa into generic mind-and-body wording.
